name: parolnet
description: > **Parol** — *parole* (speech/word) in French, *пароль* (password) in Russian, *parola* (password) in Turkish, *parola* (word) in Italian. It embodies the dual mission: **free speech protected by strong security**.

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build crates/parolnet-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../pwa/pkg --release && rm -f pwa/pkg/.gitignore pwa/pkg/package.json pwa/pkg/README.md
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build
scripts.docker:rebuild: npm run build:all && docker compose build --no-cache --build-arg BUILD_DATE="$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC')" --build-arg BUILD_COMMIT="$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)" --build-arg BUILD_VERSION="$(grep -m1 '^version' Cargo.toml | grep -oP '"\K[^"]+')" && docker compose down && docker compose up -d
